zh.title: 彼得·杜诺夫预言全集 - 保加利亚灵性导师关于第六种族与新纪元的预言 | Peter Deunov Prophecies
zh.description: 保加利亚灵性导师彼得·杜诺夫（贝因萨·杜诺，1864-1944）的预言完整收录，包括1944年临终预言、第六种族、地球转变、爱的文明等核心主题，附真实度验证。

zh.twitterDescription: 保加利亚灵性导师杜诺夫的预言收录——第六种族、爱的文明、地球轴移、二战预测等，含真实度验证。

en.title: Peter Deunov Prophecies - Bulgarian Spiritual Master's Predictions on the Sixth Race & New Era | Full Archive
en.description: Complete archive of prophecies by Peter Deunov (Beinsa Douno, 1864-1944), Bulgarian spiritual teacher and founder of the Universal White Brotherhood. Includes his famous 1944 deathbed prophecy, predictions about the Sixth Race, Earth's transformation, and civilization of love.
en.keywords: Peter Deunov,Beinsa Douno,Sixth Race,Universal White Brotherhood,deathbed prophecy,Bulgarian prophet,new era prophecy,spiritual master,Earth transformation
en.ogTitle: Peter Deunov Prophecies - The Sixth Race & New Era
en.ogDescription: Complete archive of prophecies by Peter Deunov (Beinsa Douno, 1864-1944), including his famous deathbed prophecy about the Sixth Race and humanity's transformation.
en.twitterDescription: Prophecies of Peter Deunov (Beinsa Douno): the Sixth Race, civilization of love, Earth axis shift, WWII predictions. With verification analysis.
